scenario.name: analyst
scenario.description: RAG / Document Analysis — Prefill Stress Test
scenario.justification: With 8192 input tokens and only 128 output tokens, >98% of compute is spent in the prefill phase. This isolates GPU TFLOPS as the sole bottleneck. If this scenario is slow, adding more network bandwidth or NVLink won't help — you need faster GPUs.

sensitivity.network: LOW — Prefill is parallelizable; one large matmul amortizes sync cost
sensitivity.nvlink: MODERATE — KV-cache distribution benefits from high bandwidth
sensitivity.vram: HIGH — 8K context requires significant KV-cache allocation

ttft.description: Time To First Token — measures prefill + scheduling latency

tpot.description: Time Per Output Token — steady-state decode speed

analysis.decode_bottleneck: COMPUTE/MEMORY-BOUND. GPU hardware is the primary bottleneck (healthy state).
